dict.string: TokenMonitor reads Claude Code and Codex CLI session logs from ~/.claude and ~/.codex to calculate your token usage and cost. Logs stay on this device — nothing is uploaded except optional rate-limit checks against Anthropic's API.

TokenMonitor reads Claude Code and Codex CLI session logs from your home directory to calculate token usage and cost. Allow access only if your home directory or Claude/Codex config is hosted on a network volume.
TokenMonitor reads Claude Code and Codex CLI session logs from your home directory. Allow access only if your home directory or Claude/Codex config is on an external drive.
TokenMonitor does not read from Desktop by design. Deny unless your Claude or Codex config is explicitly stored there.
TokenMonitor does not read from Documents by design. Deny unless your Claude or Codex config is explicitly stored there.
TokenMonitor does not read from Downloads by design. Deny unless your Claude or Codex config is explicitly stored there.
